steps.title: Fastest path: graph or solve the equation
steps.content:
Type the equation into Desmos as written:
$$4x^2 - x = 18$$Graph it and use the visible intercept, root, or vertex the question asks for. The requested value is 2.25,9/4.

steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Rewrite as $4x^2-x-18=0$ and factor: $$(4x-9)(x+2)=0.$$ The roots are $x=\tfrac{9}{4}$ and $x=-2$.

steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: Take the positive root. The answer is 9/4.
